query:
ALTER TABLE candidateApplications 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS region ENUM('wallonie', 'flandre', 'bruxelles') DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS category ENUM('miss', 'mister', 'teen_miss', 'teen_mister') DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS motivation TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS interests TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS profession VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS linkedin VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS acceptedMedia INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS acceptedNewsletter INT DEFAULT 0;
